form.formComment: Last start 8th of 11 at Wetherby on March 17 over 3200m, 35 len behind Sweeper System carrying 74.5kg at $17. The start before that 2nd of 9 at Southwell on March 2 over 3200m, slow going 15 len behind Nice One Eric with 72kg at $26. Rates highly among this company and is right in the mix.

form.formComment: Mare back from a spell of five months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign when last of 10 at Newcastle All Weather November 6 over 2000m, 14 len behind Without Compromise carrying 57kg at $51. First up last campaign second last of 8 at Hamilton Park May 4 over 2200m, 10 len behind Mister Daydream carrying 56.5kg at $19. Among the chances.

form.formComment: Resumes after a break of six months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation second last of 9 at Newcastle All Weather October 9 over 3300m, 23 len behind Both Of Us carrying 62.5kg at $29. Previously first up; third in a small field at Redcar April 21 over 2800m, 5 len behind Media Mogul with 62kg at $10. Can return with a bold run.
